title: Grade
description: The structured output every grading run must produce. The Stop hook validates against this — a grade that does not conform forces the loop to keep working.

submission_id.description: Filename stem of the graded submission, e.g. 'alice'.

criteria.description: One entry per rubric criterion. Keys must match the rubric exactly.

overall.description: Coarse final verdict. Low-precision on purpose — LLMs calibrate 3 buckets far better than a 1-100 scale.

confidence.description: How sure the grader is. Below the escalation threshold the case is routed to a human, NOT trusted.

needs_human_review.description: Set by the grader and/or the escalation gate. The whole point of the loop: surface only the uncertain cases.

reasoning.description: Short justification tying the verdict back to rubric evidence.

evidence.description: A quote or specific pointer from the submission that justifies the level.
